vulnerabilities.description: job_type input containing quote characters triggers 500 errors, indicating unsanitized string concatenation into a database query; likely injectable and could potentially bypass filtering to access private records.
OpenAPI specification is publicly accessible and reveals available endpoints and operations.
Swagger UI is publicly accessible, exposing API documentation and facilitating enumeration.
Frontend injects server-provided job fields directly into the DOM via innerHTML without sanitization; if job data contains HTML/JS, it may execute in clients.
